notes: Adjusted plan so all main wall, roof, trim, glass, and floor roles use distinct block types; avoided collapsing roles into one material.

Some initial perimeter markers and roof eave coordinates were outside bbox; included a final 'clip_to_bbox' op and noted that perimeter marker positions should be placed constrained to bbox (left as visual hint).
Used 'brick' as placeholder for dark stripe; user may substitute nether_brick if preferred.
Confirmed a U-shaped courtyard by carving a hollow rectangle inset from outer walls; entrance is at front wall (z=13) and is 2 blocks high.
